text.title: Rust Integration Tests
text.summary: Integration tests in tests/*.rs against real axum::Router via tower::ServiceExt, with testcontainers for real databases.

rule.statement: Test HTTP endpoints by calling the `axum::Router` directly via `tower::ServiceExt::oneshot`, without starting a real TCP server.
rule.rationale: Direct router testing is faster, avoids port conflicts, and still exercises middleware, routing, extractors, and response serialization — the full HTTP stack minus TCP.

rule.statement: Use `testcontainers` for integration tests that touch a database. Avoid SQLite-as-Postgres substitutes.
rule.rationale: SQLite silently accepts SQL that Postgres rejects (type casting, RETURNING clauses, JSON operators). Real Postgres catches dialect bugs that SQLite misses.
